flags.message: Snapshot is maximally sparse: the caption is only the docket number ('No. 90-1397'), with no parties, no docket-number field, no dates, and no docket entries — only a link to one opinion cluster. Unlike sparse dockets with a recognizable caption, the underlying case cannot be identified, so the prediction is purely base-rate driven from corpus stats. If the linked cluster's disposition text were ingested into the corpus/snapshot, this docket would likely be recoverable (probe-recoverability candidate).
